nasb.text: so that the priests could not stand to minister because of the cloud, for the glory of the Lord filled the house of the Lord.

esv.text: so that the priests could not stand to minister because of the cloud, for the glory of the Lord filled the house of the Lord.

cnv.text: 因為雲彩的緣故，祭司不能站立服事，因為耶和華的榮光充滿了聖殿。

ccb.text: 以致祭司不能留在殿里供职，因为那里充满了耶和华的荣光。
